failedAssertions.reason: Module-level access control not implemented in API routes. JWT middleware validates tokens but does not check the 'modules' claim against the requested endpoint. A kas-only user token can successfully access bank/gudang endpoints.

Database schemas for transaction tables (kas, bank, gudang) do not define FOREIGN KEY constraints. Referential integrity is not enforced at the SQLite/D1 layer; only application-layer validation exists in kasDatabase.ts/bankDatabase.ts/gudangDatabase.ts.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Cannot access real Cloudflare D1 from test environment; remote D1 query returns Cloudflare API error 7403. Local Miniflare simulation incompatible with db.exec() multiline SQL.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Milestone 1 testing notes: headless Windows blocks agent-browser, remote D1 inaccessible (CF API 7403), Miniflare db.exec() multiline SQL incompatibility, Windows cmd workaround for wrangler dev + curl

environmentCheck.reason: Windows headless environment without graphical display driver; Cloudflare API account authorization missing for remote D1; Miniflare local D1 simulation has db.exec() multiline SQL bug

verifiedByDirectInspection.schemaParity: Verified via sql.js introspection that local schemas match D1 definitions from softwaresawit-api/src/lib/migrations.ts
verifiedByDirectInspection.dataPersistence: Verified that database files are saved to disk and reloaded across app restarts

notes.partialProgress: Successfully started wrangler dev and confirmed health endpoint. Discovered Miniflare db.exec() incompatibility causing 500s on all CRUD endpoints. Confirmed Electron starts and initializes local databases but cannot render window.
